ref: Joseph's brothers were jealous of him, but his father kept wondering about the dream. Joseph Is Sold and Taken to Egypt
text: Ka o biɛyanim’ maa daa zabir’ o nyuli di zuɣu, amaa ka o ba daa zaŋ o ni yɛli shɛm maa niŋ o suhu ni. Bɛ gbaai Yisifu kɔhi, ka bɛ zaŋ o kuli Ijipti
translated: His brothers were jealous of him, but his father kept the matter in mind. They seized Joseph and sold him into slavery in Egypt.

ref: Isaac called in Jacob, then gave him a blessing, and said: Don't marry any of those Canaanite women.
text: Di saha ka Yisahaku daa boli Yaakubu na ti niŋ alibarika niŋ o ni ka yɛl’ o, “Miri ka a kpuɣi Keenan paɣa.
translated: Then Isaac called Jacob and blessed him, and charged him, "You shall not marry one of the Canaanite women.

ref: Then God let her see a well. So she went to the well and filled the skin with water, then gave some to her son.
text: Di saha maa ka Naawuni daa chɛ ka o nina neei, ka o nya ka kɔbiliga doya, ka o daa chaŋ di ni nti tooi kom pal’ o kom koligu maa na nti booi li ti bia maa ka o nyu.
translated: At that moment, God allowed her to see, and she saw a well, and she went there to draw water and filled the water bottle and brought it back to give to the child to drink.

ref: and the Lord sent burning sulfur down like rain on Sodom and Gomorrah.
text: Di saha ka Yawɛ daa chɛ ka chilibi buɣim yi o sani alizanda ni n-lu Sɔdom mini Gomɔra zuɣu na
translated: Then the Lord rained down burning sulfur on Sodom and Gomorrah—from the Lord out of the heavens.

ref: Three days later the men who had been circumcised were still weak from pain. So Simeon and Levi, two of Dinah's brothers, attacked with their swords and killed every man in the town,
text: Di daba ata dali, niriba maa gunibu maa yuma ni daa na biɛri saha shɛli maa, ka Yaakubu bidibis’ ayi, Simiɔn mini Lɛvi bɛn daa nyɛ Daina tizɔdɔbba la daa zaŋ takɔbiri chaŋ ti liri tiŋ’ maa nima n-libigi ba ku bɛ dɔbba zaa.
translated: On the third day, when they were still in pain, two of Jacob's sons, Simeon and Levi, Dinah's brothers, took their swords and went into the town unopposed and killed every male.
